metadata.title: Will AI Take My Job? Free AI Job Risk Checker
metadata.description: Use this free AI job risk checker to estimate your AI exposure from your job title, daily tasks, work type, and experience level.

page.title: Will AI Take My Job? Free AI Job Risk Checker

hero.title: Will AI Take My Job? Free AI Job Risk Checker
hero.description: Estimate your AI exposure score. See exposed tasks, safer tasks, and a practical career plan. No login or saved input.

checker.title: Check AI risk
checker.description: The checker uses task-level rules. It does not call an AI provider or store your answers.

interpret.title: How to interpret your score
interpret.description: Use the score as a planning signal, not a prediction.

items.title: Low
items.description: Your work likely includes physical, care-based, leadership, or accountability-heavy tasks.

items.title: Moderate
items.description: Some tasks can be accelerated by AI, but important human-centered work remains.

items.title: High or very high
items.description: Many daily tasks are digital, repeatable, text-heavy, data-heavy, or rules-based.

items.question: Does this tool use AI?
items.answer: No. The checker uses deterministic rules so the score is fast, transparent, and does not require a provider key.

items.question: Do you save my input?
items.answer: No. The checker runs in the browser and does not save your job title or selected tasks.

items.question: What should I do with a high score?
items.answer: Learn to use AI for exposed tasks, then build judgment, communication, domain expertise, and accountability around the work AI cannot own.
